news:news.news:title: Cuba begins releasing over 2,000 prisoners amid US pressure, while military leaders in Burkina Faso reject democracy.
news:news.news:keywords: US military operations, Cuba prisoner release, Burkina Faso military leadership, France Muslim gathering ruling, Italy cyber-attack news

news:news.news:title: The US jobs market showed unexpected strength in March, but concerns remain over the impact of the Gulf oil supply crisis and rising costs.
news:news.news:keywords: US jobs market performance, impact of Gulf oil crisis, Ticketmaster fee controversy, Trump's tariffs on pharmaceuticals, Blue Owl Capital withdrawal limits

news:news.news:title: NASA resolved a technical issue during Artemis II's mission, while OpenAI's AGI CEO is on medical leave amid ongoing leadership changes.
news:news.news:keywords: NASA Artemis II mission updates, OpenAI leadership changes, Lenovo gaming hardware price increase, Mercedes steer-by-wire technology, Apple Watch health technology impact

news:news.news:title: Luka Doncic will miss the rest of the NBA regular season due to a hamstring injury, while Stephen Curry is expected to return for the Warriors this Sunday.
news:news.news:keywords: NBA injury updates, NFL player conduct investigations, WNBA expansion draft news, NCAA athlete transfer policies, Women's Final Four predictions

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific advancements include a gene therapy for deafness, insights into aging and immune response, and a new approach to lunar exploration with Artemis II.
news:news.news:keywords: gene therapy for hearing loss, impact of aging on immune response, NASA Artemis II mission details, ancient fossils and spider evolution, healthier cooking techniques

news:news.news:title: The ongoing war in Iran is causing significant economic distress and impacting global supply chains, while political tensions in the US and Europe continue to rise.
news:news.news:keywords: Iran war humanitarian crisis, Trump political changes, Brazil pet custody law, Greece weather impact, US-Israel relations

news:news.news:title: Oil prices surged following Trump's warning to Iran, while Blue Owl Capital limited withdrawals amid investor concerns over the unregulated lending market.
news:news.news:keywords: impact of geopolitical tensions on oil prices, corporate layoffs in tech sector, pharmaceutical industry tariffs, investor confidence in lending markets, construction worker health issues

news:news.news:title: Archive of Our Own exits beta after 17 years, while Granola app raises privacy concerns over note-sharing settings.
news:news.news:keywords: privacy concerns in technology, updates on popular tech platforms, new product innovations in gadgets

news:news.news:title: Tiger Woods faces DUI charges following a crash, while Luka Doncic's injury raises concerns for the NBA playoffs.
news:news.news:keywords: Tiger Woods DUI arrest details, Luka Doncic injury update, Phil Mickelson Masters withdrawal, Stephon Gilmore retirement announcement, Women's NCAA Final Four predictions

news:news.news:title: NASA's Artemis II mission marks the first crewed Moon flyby in over 50 years, alongside significant discoveries in health, archaeology, and environmental science.
news:news.news:keywords: NASA Artemis II mission details, health benefits of new frying technique, ancient gambling practices in America, microbial fingerprints in colorectal cancer, new species discoveries in South America

news:news.news:title: Experts Debunk US Claims on Iran Missile Strike as Artemis II Launches Historic Lunar Mission
Oil Prices Spike Amid Trump’s Warning on Iran; Blue Owl Capital Limits Withdrawals
